{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324094702557451BB5E1171A3151D"}"},"total":3257},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535495096538268441","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"描写很有趣，这种迪化流真的好爽，从观众的视角代入，第三个副本结束，没有槽点，主角不受委屈，惹到他的最后都会被解决，很迅速，剧情也在线，一起下副本的都很聪明，分析线索能力很强，主角一次次死亡回档也有自己的思考，有的时候细写回档，有的时候直接到回档后，也有简单的总结，一切都很恰当，就这个节奏很好，超级喜欢这本书，迫不及待想看后面剧情了，很期待新的副本，每日坐等更新[爱慕][爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":96,"s":92,"text":"死亡回档","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%AD%BB%E4%BA%A1%E5%9B%9E%E6%A1%A3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177431682271A3151D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535495096538268441%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227510885086120643608%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%AD%BB%E4%BA%A1%E5%9B%9E%E6%A1%A3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754498005,"group_id":"7510885086120643608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"主角控，书架不全是能看的，有的看了一些有雷点弃了但还在书架。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2pVwI+GtKgKLT2zuNMM53b35GzEfRIpMm07b2jDbjmT","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a52a2b0fbbf846cebd9b5e11550b0ec4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883078&x-signature=u00a25IJmUJ4GGFXTPPK590VqVo%3D","user_id":"3861083980573255","user_name":"lu€"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3861083980573255","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7510885086120643608","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+直播求生+死亡回档+半迪化】
【无cp】【文内会拥有大量弹幕描写】
许奚加班猝死后穿越到了另一个被求生游戏入侵的世界，甚至还发现自己拥有了死后回档的能力，在他利用这个能力多次化险为夷，成功通关副本后，也意外被现实世界的网友们当成了顶尖大佬。
“他到底咋知道这么做能通关的？？？”
“所以许奚又看出什么了？有无大佬分析一下，小弟我真看不懂这些操作啊！”
“woc，这深不可测的城府，这缜密细致的思维，这滴水不漏的细节把控力，唯有二字形容——牛逼！”
“别看他似乎低调不起眼的样子，实际上悄无声息地隐居幕后，正游刃有余地掌控着大局！”
许奚如果能得知网友们对他的评价，一定会一脸冤枉地大喊道：
不！你们脑补得太多啦！他没有什么深不可测的城府，也没有什么缜密细致的思维，更没有什么滴水不漏的细节把控力，一切都是他死出来的啊！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e964f4d4aa2015157c72988e1d86c500","author":"钱有什么不好","author_id":"","book_id":"7510885086120643608","book_name":"回档求生：我真不是大佬啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7510887040393675288","read_count":"116862","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"326100"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"157","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,直播,无限流,灵异,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0362daf8800f37630feed8b8312182fc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500822&x-signature=eGQ0JQ8Nx7NKvTWAQENXGU6RhBg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4029086996105603","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"51"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324094702557451BB5E1171A3151D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"}," 在副本里可以无限（目前51章来看是这样）死亡回档的主角！
迪化！有脑！会装！不尴尬！
弹幕、观众、外界反映欢乐多~
事后迪化主角操作分析，有脑~合理~不牵强~
副本一:看主角操作猛如虎！一看通关时间2分48秒！主角力度刚刚好，懵逼不伤观众脑~从此荣获外号2分48秒~
副本二:主角沉默寡言高深佬，队友膜拜迪化通关易！
副本三:队友算计不满被坑杀，最后队友迪化心慌慌，主角阴差阳错成恶佬，主角表示真无辜，队友遥看三死人，真假信否沉默对
